actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Just as with dance, progress involves a number of steps done in an ordered sequence.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Just like dancing, progress is an art that can look messy sometimes,   but it's still a worthy effort.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Progress happens on the world stage or on a smaller, local stage, just like dance.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The individual steps of progress might not seem related or make sense to an observer, but like in dance, together they add up to something bigger.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: You've got to step out and take that first step.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Just like with dancing, to make progress you've got to step out and take that first step, even if you lack confidence in the result.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: They're two steps forward, one step back.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Just as with dance choreography, making progress sometimes mean you take two steps forward, and one step back.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Like dance, progress looks different to the audience; the audience doesn't see the sweat and tears that went into achieving it.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The country is coming out of a long, slow tango and starting to waltz again.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: As with dance, progress doesn't always proceed at the same pace or tempo, so it can be said the country is coming out of a long, slow tango and starting to waltz again.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: You have to lead and follow.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Just as in dance, when it comes to progress some have to lead and others have to follow, taking care not to step on toes.
